titles.title: Just a Closer Walk with Thee

properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I am weak but Thou art strong, Jesus keep me from all wrong; I'll be satisfied as long, As I walk let me walk close to Thee.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Just a closer walk with Thee, Grant it, Jesus, is my plea; Daily walking close to Thee, Let it be, dear Lord, let it be.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Thru this world of toil and snares, If I falter, Lord, who cares? Who with me my burden shares? None but Thee, dear Lord, none but Thee.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: When my feeble life is o'er, Time for me will be no more; Guide me gently, safely o'er, To Thy kingdom shore, to Thy shore.
